summary: Tested film creation bug fix (cast_members NameError). All backend tests pass (11/11). Film creation works correctly with 1-5 actors. Quality score is calculated using cast member data from DB. Also fixed a separate bug in GET /api/composers endpoint (NoneType error).

issues: Console shows 'Failed to load resource: status 400' - appears to be avatar/resource loading, non-blocking

critical_code_review_comments: Film creation bug fixed: cast_members = [] loop added at line ~3916 before quality calculation
fetchPeople in App.js now has try/catch with automatic 1-second retry (lines 3443-3480)
Also found and fixed GET /api/composers endpoint bug: comp_info.get('id') was failing when composer was None in film records

success_rate.frontend: N/A (wizard navigation complex, backend APIs verified working)

seed_data_creation: Multiple test films created during testing (prefixed TEST_)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Film creation is now working. The cast_members fix loads actor docs from DB before quality calculation. Composers endpoint also fixed. Console 400/429 errors are rate limiting/avatar loading issues, non-blocking.

composers_endpoint.issue: comp_info.get('id') was failing when film.get('composer') returned None instead of empty dict
composers_endpoint.fix: Added check for comp_info existence and isinstance(comp_info, dict) before accessing .get('id')
